response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the main performance as an original song '抗う君への鎮魂歌' by Takane Lui, with composer Yota Hotta credited on-screen. 2. Transcribed lyrics for '抗う君への鎮魂歌' as they were not found in initial searches. 3. Identified the interlude song snippet as 'Tori To Re:TreaT' by Takane Lui (Composer: Hayashibe Tomonori) using the search tool and confirmed via lyrics. 4. Created scene breaks based on the structure of the video (Intro, Performance, Interlude/Collage, Outro/Announcement). 5. Populated JSON with identified metadata and full transcribed/found lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance by the VTuber Takane Lui. The video begins with an intro followed by a performance of her original song '抗う君への鎮魂歌'. It then transitions to a short interlude/collage and finishes with an announcement of her 1st live concert, 'Rebellion', scheduled for 2026.12.16.

scenes.description: Introductory scene with the stage setting and the title card '抗う君への鎮魂歌'.
Takane Lui performs her original song '抗う君への鎮魂歌'. Choreography and lighting effects are present. Music and lyrics by Yota Hotta.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ただしさだけが纏える術があれば
少しは救われるだろうか
その瞳へと問いかける
守るべきを捨てるべきと誰にか導かされても
もう心かよわねえなら
それは虚偽だ
何も捨てずに抗え
力なき者じゃ
その覚悟で生きそうに
ただ正しいさだとな
失えば失うほどにさらに気高かく
その意思で世界を裏目
心が軋んで何度も引き裂かれようとも
抗え
かよわき一人を
守り抜くためのこの手のひらがどれだけ汚れてしまっても
構わないさ
君が笑うなら
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If there were a way to wear only righteousness,
would I be saved a little?
I ask that into those eyes.
Even if someone guides me to discard what I should protect,
if my heart does not connect anymore,
that is a falsehood.
Resist without discarding anything.
As someone powerless,
if you seem to live with that resolve,
if it is only righteousness,
The more you lose, the more noble you become,
with that will, betray the world.
Even if my heart creaks and is torn apart many times,
resist.
Even if these palms of mine, used to protect
the frail one,
become stained as much as they may,
I do not care,
if you smile.

scenes.description: A fast-paced collage of various scenes featuring Takane Lui, accompanied by snippets of her song 'Tori To Re:TreaT'.

鍵開けて?「私のセカイ」

で?キミはカゴの虜
Ti ti ti li ta Ti ti li Ti ti la

爪を隠して(アイロニー)
誘ってあげる(愛をね)
Luiは友呼ぶ
Welcome to my little world!
Trip!!
「Tori To Re:TreaT」
ようこそ!トリ巻いてね
世界をトリこで満たして
「TreaT&Re:TreaT」
〈逃避行にご注意!〉

welcome!私のセカイへ

Freaky show in a birdcage
Unlock it? 'My World'
The opening move is an infinite restart.
So? Are you a prisoner of the cage?
Ti ti ti li ta Ti ti li Ti ti la
Ti ti ti li ta Eden is here
Hiding my claws (Irony)
I'll invite you (with love)
Lui calls her friends
Welcome to my little world!
Trip!!
'Tori To Re:TreaT'

Fill the world with captives
'TreaT & Re:TreaT'
<Beware of the escape!>
Is the cage shaking? Well, that's fine
Welcome! To my world

scenes.description: Takane Lui speaks to the audience, announcing her 1st live performance 'Rebellion'.
